title: feat(ibg-repository): repository change proposal contracts (IBG-1 PR A)
intent: Add the ibg_repository package with deterministic, content-addressed repository change proposal contracts: ProposalTargetBinding (constitutional adapter over the existing BodyEvidenceCandidate), a CBSP21 patch-packet adapter, RepositoryChangeProposal, and a RepositoryProposalReviewPackage wrapper over the existing IBG ReviewPackage. Contracts only — no git execution, no router, no filesystem or network I/O, no canonical authority. Includes the IBG-1 archaeology inventory that grounded this design.
behavior_change: Adds new additive contract modules under a new package (services/api/app/ibg_repository/). No existing runtime path imports them yet; no existing behavior changes.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Creates services/api/app/ibg_repository/ (proposal_target, cbsp21_patch_adapter, repository_change_proposal, repository_review_package, __init__) plus its test suite, and adds docs/handoffs/IBG_1_ARCHAEOLOGY_INVENTORY.md. Contracts derive evidence-owned fields from a governed BodyEvidenceCandidate, emit the existing cbsp21_patch_input_v1 shape via an adapter, and content-address proposals with wall-clock time excluded from the canonical hash and serialization. Fail-closed invariants added in review: (1) the CBSP21 packet adapter rejects absolute/traversal paths symmetrically with ProposalTargetBinding; (2) build_repository_change_proposal enforces that every declared files_expected_to_change entry falls within the binding's authorized_target_paths (prefix-aware, mirroring the gate's scope semantics); (3) proposed_branch is validated as a plausible git ref. The required-fields drift test now binds to the real gate source (scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_patch_input.py) via AST rather than a duplicated literal.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: No repository change proposal / patch-adapter / repository review-package contracts existed; the only prior review package is body-geometry-scoped (instrument_geometry/body/ibg/workflow/review_package.py) and is reused (wrapped), not duplicated. This adds a new, distinct capability boundary (repository proposal automation) that did not previously exist in the tree.

commands_run: python -m pytest tests/ibg_repository/ -q  ->  all passed (expanded with drift/consistency/path-safety/branch invariants)

files.intent: Record the read-only archaeology inventory that grounded PR A.
Package init re-exporting the public contract API.
Adapter emitting/validating the existing cbsp21_patch_input_v1 packet shape.
RepositoryProposalReviewPackage wrapper over the existing IBG ReviewPackage.
Shared factory fixtures building a real governed candidate and CBSP21 packet.

architecture_scan.acknowledgement_notes: Additive contract-only package. No git/filesystem/network execution, no router wiring, no canonical authority. Worktree builder and draft-PR metadata are deferred to PR B and PR C.
